name: agent-review-pipeline
description: Multi-engine 5-stage autonomous review pipeline with Dual-Engine Consensus. Auto-routes backend→Codex, frontend→Gemini.

maxIterations.title: Max Iterations
maxIterations.description: Max auto-fix retry loops per stage before escalating (0 = unlimited)

failOnError.title: Fail On Error
failOnError.description: If true, abort pipeline on first stage that can't PASS within maxIterations instead of escalating

defaultEngine.title: Default Engine
defaultEngine.description: Engine selection when none specified on CLI. Values: both, gemini, codex

geminiModel.title: Gemini Model
geminiModel.description: Model override for the Gemini subagent. Defaults to gemini-3.1-pro-preview.

autoCommit.title: Auto Commit Fixes
autoCommit.description: If true, autonomously commit fixes at the end of the pipeline (Stage 5).

postPrComment.title: Post PR Comment
postPrComment.description: If true, automatically post the executive summary to the GitHub PR using 'gh pr comment'.
